nf/quick-397-build-a-command-to-run-nf-s.task_description: Improve the benchmark to actually test nf:solve autonomy — add a real autonomy track with seeded defects and residual reduction scoring
nf/quick-397-build-a-command-to-run-nf-s.approach: Add a real autonomy track with synthetic defects seeded into fixture requirements, measuring nf:solve's ability to detect and eliminate those injected residuals through iterative remediation cycles.
out_of_scope: Modifying nf-solve.cjs core engine — only fixture definitions and benchmark runner changes
Creating persistent test repositories or external benchmark datasets — fixtures run against current project root
Implementing machine learning or statistical significance testing for performance comparisons
Adding human-in-the-loop validation or manual checkpoint gates during benchmark execution
Extending the benchmark to test multiple nforma versions or regression detection across releases
nf/quick-397-build-a-command-to-run-nf-s.risk_reason: Task modifies benchmark functionality in a single file (nf-benchmark-solve.cjs) with feature-level changes to add new autonomy track with seeded defects and scoring logic, requiring non-trivial implementation beyond simple config changes.
